caption: Two people are recording a podcast in a studio featuring a white backdrop with yellow stars and the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "UNICORN HUSTLE" written on it. A woman wearing a green t-shirt sits behind a professional microphone, listening while facing a man. The man wears a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold. He sits behind his own microphone, holding a small rectangular card or photo. Across the frames, the man speaks and smiles, glancing down at the item in his hand and then back up. A black banner in the background reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "It's A Unique Hustle." A small logo with the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in the bottom corner of each shot, alongside "UNICORN HUSTLE" branding on a black container on the table.
